_comment: OPERATOR-DROPPED LOCAL FILE (test copy, IMPLEMENTATION-014F) -- structured extract of an IREN investor presentation exercising the customer / supplier / bottleneck / leadership evidence sensors. Everything the company says about itself is a company_claim at primary authority -- NEVER a verified_fact, never canonical. Deterministic; local file only.
title: IREN Investor Presentation - Evidence Slice - June 2026

claims.claim: Phase 2 adds 100 megawatts of additional data center capacity in 2027
Share count increased 18% since 2024 across two equity raises and an ATM program
Our capital allocation framework prioritises high-return reinvestment ahead of any buyback

customer_mentions.name: Acme Cloud
customer_mentions.statement: Acme Cloud signed a multi-year AI cloud services agreement covering two campuses

customer_mentions.name: Titan Robotics
customer_mentions.statement: Titan Robotics is our largest customer at approximately 45 percent of FY2026 revenue

customer_mentions.name: Borealis Labs
customer_mentions.statement: Borealis Labs named as an early adoption customer for the inference platform

customer_mentions.name: Cypress Systems
customer_mentions.statement: Cypress Systems named as a customer

supplier_mentions.name: NovaFab
supplier_mentions.statement: NovaFab named as sole supplier of the custom actuator module

supplier_mentions.name: Meridian Power
supplier_mentions.statement: We are qualifying a second-source supplier for power modules to reduce reliance on Meridian Power

supplier_mentions.name: Helios Materials
supplier_mentions.statement: Helios Materials named as battery cell partner

leadership_statements.name: R. Founder
leadership_statements.statement: Our founder-led team has delivered every data center milestone on schedule

leadership_statements.name: S. Steward
leadership_statements.statement: Management acknowledges the prior product launch was delayed by two quarters

leadership_statements.name: R. Founder
leadership_statements.statement: The board reviews capital allocation quarterly with a preference for reinvestment
